description: Authoring guides for Claude Code artifacts — skills, agents, hooks, plugins — plus a routine-detector that suggests scaffolding a project skill when work turns repetitive, a project-skill-suggester that proactively offers one when a task's cards share uncovered repository-specific knowledge, and /claude-authoring:new-skill|new-agent|new-hook|new-plugin scaffold commands.
